name: Applesauce Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages cream cheese, softened (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, mix all crust ingredients and press into the bottom of a 10-inch spring-form pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese with sugar until light and fluffy. Add flour, then eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in remaining filling ingredients until well blended.
4. Pour batter into crust-lined pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until center is set. Let cool completely.
6. Refrigerate several hours or overnight before serving.
7. Before serving, carefully remove the sides of the pan and top each slice with Toasted Pecan Sauce.
Toasted Pecan Sauce:
1. Melt butter in a medium saucepan.
2. Stir in brown sugar and corn syrup. Bring to a boil and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually stir in whipping cream; return to a boil.
4. Remove from heat and stir in toasted pecans. Makes 2-1/4 cups of sauce.
